name: Dump Cake (Marcy Stephens)
recipeInstructions:
1. Spread cherry pie filling in a 9x13-inch pan.
2. On top of this, spread crushed pineapple along with the juice.
3. Sprinkle dry cake evenly over this layer.
4. Melt 2 sticks butter and pour over the dry ingredients.
5. Sprinkle shredded coconut on top.
6. Sprinkle chopped pecans on top.
7. Bake at 350°F for 1 hour.
